Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Sep-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Nichole D. Podugrski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Carole Montenegro, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Noah Casey; present in court. Father of minor James Casey also present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $75,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 0.00
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amoun of $55,000.00
Cost (current costs $58,081) reduced to $55,000.00 to Donahue & Horrow, LLP 1960 E. Grand Ave., Suite 1215 El Segundo, CA 90245.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment $55,000.00.

A net balance of $20,000.00 will be used to purchase an annuity for the minor from Prudential Insurance Company of America. The terms of the annuity are attached to Order.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise.
Status Hearing Scheduled on August 19, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the purchase of annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
